productDisplayName: Puma Men Royal Evo Black & Red Shoes
description: If you're looking for a way to enhance your sneaker-wear to a more classic, old-school appeal, this puma Royal Evo leather shoe is a great way to make a start!UpperSynthetic leather upper for style and comfortPadded collar and tongue for enhanced comfort and a snug FitPatent leather form-stripe detail in self colourUpper stitched to the outsole for extra durabilityMid ankle support for comfortBrand name embossed on the heel guardBreathable fabric lining and a cushioned foot-bed for all-day comfort.MidsoleTPU and EVA midsole combined to offer support and ample cushioningOutsoleDurable rubber outsole for absolute grip and tractionPivot points below the heel and forefoot for extra flexibilityShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
